agent.description: gm | player_a | player_b — whose recap this flag is about.

type.description: confabulation = recap contradicts the public session log (memory-write error). leak = recap contains information this agent has no in-fiction way of knowing (firewall breach). NEVER flag a belief just because it differs from objective truth or from another agent's recap — divergent beliefs are expected and must be left alone.

evidence.description: The specific line from the public session log (for confabulation) or the specific private fact that leaked (for leak) that supports this flag.
